token.description: Mailjet SMS API Bearer token. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: Mailjet SMS API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: Unix-seconds lower bound sent as the FromTS query param on the sms stream.

end_date.description: Unix-seconds upper bound sent as the ToTS query param on the sms stream.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-1000) for the sms stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
